name: ai-empty-state
title: AI Empty State
description: Opening conversation state that introduces available tasks and keeps the context check part of starting one.

props.name: description
props.default: "Check the context above before sending anything that identifies a patient."

props.name: suggestions
props.description: Prompt chips or suggestion cards — what the assistant can actually do here.

clinicalNotes: An empty assistant is where scope gets set, so this state does two jobs: it says what the assistant can do here (via suggestions, so a clinician does not have to guess a prompt) and it points at the context bar before anything identifying is typed. Prefer `insert`-mode prompt chips: a first prompt that sends the moment it is tapped gives no chance to check which patient is attached. Keep the task list to what the product actually supports — advertising a capability the assistant cannot deliver is how trust is spent.
notes: Wraps the shared empty-state primitive and adds the suggestions row.
